The [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hurom]] on [[Thule/Legends|Thule]] hosted a '''Sith temple''' built by the ancient [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] who had first colonized Thule. This imposing structure, older than many galactic civilizations, covered more than a block of the city center and dominated the cityscape for miles.<ref name="GatORW" />

Like most Sith structures on Thule, the temple seethed in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and served as the residence of Thule's [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Priest/Legends|priests]]. It served as the meeting place for government leaders and the priesthood and as a commissioning center for all outgoing troops. It was here at the Sith Temple, roughly a century prior to the [[Declaration of a New Order]], that the Sith priests received dark-sided [[Force vision/Legends|Force visions]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] yet to come.<ref name="GatORW" />
